summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Library feature (LIB-001 + LIB-002). All core functionality working correctly including semaphore-driven status display, missing ingredient highlighting, search, navigation, and PostHog analytics. Found one backend data issue affecting 2 recipes (missing status from RPC).

data_issues.issue: Returns undefined/null status for some recipes (2 out of 6 in test user's library)
data_issues.impact: Affects sort order and card display - cards with null status appear with data-semaphore='None' and sort incorrectly
data_issues.note: Frontend is correctly rendering what backend provides; this is a backend/data issue

minor_issues.issue: library_viewed PostHog event fires 3 times on mount
minor_issues.note: Likely due to React StrictMode or multiple renders; not critical

passed_tests: LIB-001: Library list loads and displays recipes with semaphore indicators
LIB-001: Cards show orange semaphore dot and left stripe correctly
LIB-001: Missing count displays with correct singular/plural ('Falta 1 ingrediente' / 'Faltan 2 ingredientes')
LIB-001: Missing count only shown on non-green cards (correctly hidden for green status)
LIB-001: Search filters recipes by title (accent and case-insensitive)
LIB-001: 'Sin resultados' message appears when search has no matches
LIB-001: Card tap navigates to /library/:id detail screen
LIB-001: Right-click on card opens removal confirmation dialog
LIB-001: Removal dialog cancel button works correctly
LIB-001: Empty state has two active CTAs: 'Añade tu primera receta' and 'Explora el catálogo'
LIB-002: Detail screen loads with recipe title and metadata
LIB-002: Semaphore banner displays correct status (orange) with Spanish label 'Te falta algún ingrediente clave'
LIB-002: Missing KEY ingredients highlighted with orange 'TE FALTA' badge
LIB-002: Missing ingredient detail shows 'No lo tienes en la despensa' in orange text
LIB-002: Shopping List CTA is disabled with 'PRÓXIMAMENTE' badge (aria-disabled='true')
LIB-002: 'He cocinado esto' CTA is disabled with 'PRÓXIMAMENTE' badge (aria-disabled='true')
LIB-002: 'Volver' button navigates back to /library
LIB-002: Direct URL to non-library recipe shows 'No se encontró la receta' state
PostHog: library_viewed event fires on mount with correct properties (recipe_count, green_count, yellow_count, orange_count)
PostHog: library_recipe_opened event fires on card click with correct properties (recipe_id, status)
Regression: Despensa (Pantry) screen still loads correctly
Regression: Mis Recetas screen still loads correctly
Navigation: /my-recipes/new is accessible (empty state CTA target)
Navigation: /discover is accessible (empty state CTA target)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix compute_library_status RPC to ensure all recipes return a valid status (green/yellow/orange). Currently 2 recipes in test user's library return undefined/null status, causing data-semaphore='None' and incorrect sort order.
